description: puma has its roots in Germany, and the brand is known for its minimalist design in high-end athletic footwear. Crafted in the brand's signature style, these puma Helium sandals are the right solution for brand conscious comfort junkies. These sandals are great for regular wear as they ensure superior traction and protection to the feet, without compromising on comfort and style.UpperSynthetic uppers with straps on the forefoot and ankle with adjustable velcro closuresPadded straps on the forefoot and on the ankle strap for a snug FitLogo embroidered on the ankle and the fore-foot strapCushioned foot-bed for all-day comfortOutsole reinforced onto the upper at the heel to act as a heel guardOutsoleTPU outsole with multi-directional lugs on the fore-foot and heel for superior gripBranding on the mid-footCurved midfootSandal careRub surface with a soft, damp cloth to remove dustDo not store in direct sunlight
